import io
import string

fn count_digit(_ line: String, _ digit: Int) -> Int
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let len = string.len(line)
  let target = digit + 48
  while i < len
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == target
      count = count + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  count
end

fn make_hashes(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    result = "#{result}#"
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut d = 0
  while d <= 9
    let cnt = count_digit(line, d)
    let hashes = make_hashes(cnt)
    println("#{d}: #{hashes}")
    d = d + 1
  end
end
